_meta.description: Hand-curated catalog of KM built-in action types. Each entry pairs a stable snake_case identifier with the KM MacroActionType, human-readable description, search keywords, and parameter hints. Search and discovery read this; the builder reads km_action_templates.json keyed by MacroActionType. `builder_supported: true` means a captured template exists; false means the type appears in search results but km_action_builder will reject with UNSUPPORTED_ACTION_TYPE.

actions.title: Speak Text
actions.description: Speak text aloud using macOS text-to-speech.
